SELECT b, c, d, e, f, g
  FROM t1
  NATURAL INNER JOIN t2
  NATURAL INNER JOIN t3
  NATURAL INNER JOIN t4
  NATURAL FULL JOIN t5
  WHERE b BETWEEN 12 AND 17
  ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST;
